title: Harry Maguire signs new Man United contract
summary: Harry Maguire has signed a new contract with Manchester United, confirming the defender's continued presence at the club. This contract extension represents the club's commitment to the former captain.
content: Harry Maguire has signed a new contract with Manchester United, the club have confirmed.

zh.title: 哈里·马奎尔与曼联签署新合同
zh.summary: 哈里·马奎尔已与曼彻斯特联队签署新合同，确认了这位后卫继续效力俱乐部。这份合同延期代表了俱乐部对这位前队长的承诺。

title: Minnesota denies Rodriguez muscle-wasting issue
summary: Colombian star James Rodríguez returned to Minnesota United FC after being hospitalized for severe dehydration, with the club denying reports of muscle-wasting issues. His recovery is proceeding toward game readiness.
content: Colombian star James Rodríguez, who was hospitalized last week for severe dehydration, returned to his MLS club Minnesota United FC on Monday to continue his ramp-up to game readiness.

zh.title: 明尼苏达否认罗德里格斯肌肉萎缩问题
zh.summary: 哥伦比亚明星詹姆斯·罗德里格斯因严重脱水住院后返回明尼苏达联队，俱乐部否认了肌肉萎缩的报道。他的恢复正在朝着比赛就绪的方向进行。

title: Cuca: Neymar had knee procedure over break
summary: Santos coach Cuca revealed that Neymar underwent a knee procedure during the international break to prepare for the World Cup in June. This procedure aims to have the star player in peak condition for the tournament.
content: Santos coach Cuca has revealed that Neymar underwent a knee procedure during the international break to "be raring to go" leading up to the World Cup in June.

zh.title: 库卡：内马尔在休息期间进行了膝盖手术
zh.summary: 桑托斯主教练库卡透露，内马尔在国际比赛日期间进行了膝盖手术，为6月的世界杯做准备。这个手术旨在让这位明星球员为锦标赛做最佳准备。

title: Joey Barton denies assault outside golf club
summary: Former Manchester City footballer Joey Barton has denied assaulting a man outside a golf club. The legal matter remains unresolved.
content: Former Manchester City footballer Joey Barton has denied assaulting a man outside a golf club.

zh.title: 乔伊·巴顿否认在高尔夫俱乐部外进行袭击
zh.summary: 前曼城足球运动员乔伊·巴顿否认在高尔夫俱乐部外袭击一名男子。该法律事项仍未解决。

title: Ex-Arsenal star Ramsey announces retirement
summary: Former Arsenal and Wales midfielder Aaron Ramsey has announced his retirement from professional football. The announcement marks the end of a distinguished career at club and international level.
content: Former Arsenal and Wales midfielder Aaron Ramsey has announced his retirement from football.

zh.title: 阿森纳前明星拉姆塞宣布退役
zh.summary: 前阿森纳和威尔士中场球员亚伦·拉姆塞宣布从职业足球生涯中退役。该宣布标志着他在俱乐部和国际水平上杰出职业生涯的结束。

title: Bruno Fernandes is 31 and Man United's MVP, but they shouldn't extend his contract
summary: Despite Bruno Fernandes' brilliant season as Manchester United's MVP, contract extension may not be advisable given outcomes from similar situations like Liverpool's Mohamed Salah. The decision raises questions about long-term strategy for aging superstars.
content: Bruno Fernandes' brilliant season means that Man United's decision to extend his contract should be an obvious one, right? Except, looking at how things played out with Liverpool and Mo Salah, it's not so simple.

zh.title: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯31岁且是曼联MVP，但他们不应该延长他的合同
zh.summary: 尽管布鲁诺·费尔南德斯作为曼联MVP的赛季表现出众，但考虑到类似利物浦的穆罕默德·萨拉赫的情况，延长合同可能不可取。这个决定引发了关于年迈超级巨星长期战略的问题。

title: NWSL Power Rankings: San Diego leads the way, Washington back on track
summary: San Diego Wave has claimed the top spot in ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings while Washington Spirit have climbed the standings. These shifts reflect the competitive landscape of women's professional soccer.
content: San Diego Wave are the new leaders of the ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, while the Washington Spirit are soaring up.

zh.title: NWSL实力排名：圣地亚哥领跑，华盛顿重回正轨
zh.summary: 圣地亚哥波浪队在ESPN的NWSL实力排名中占据榜首位置，华盛顿精神队则上升了排名。这些变化反映了女子职业足球的竞争格局。

title: Hearts and Celtic given potential final-day title decider
summary: Heart of Midlothian and Celtic may face each other on the final day of the Scottish Premiership season on May 16 after post-split fixtures were announced. This potential matchup could determine the title outcome.
content: Heart of Midlothian and Celtic face a potential, final-day title decider in Glasgow on Saturday, 16 May after the Scottish Professional Football League announced the Premiership's post-split fixtures.

zh.title: 哈茨和凯尔特人可能在最后一天进行冠军决战
zh.summary: 赫茨队和凯尔特人队在宣布赛后赛程后，可能在苏超赛季最后一天（5月16日）相遇。这场潜在的对阵可能会决定冠军归属。

title: Maguire signs one-year contract at Man Utd
summary: Former Manchester United captain Harry Maguire has signed a new one-year contract with the club. The extension secures the defender's future at Old Trafford.
content: Former captain Harry Maguire signs a new one-year contract with Manchester United.

zh.title: 马圭尔与曼联签署一年合同
zh.summary: 曼联前队长哈里·马圭尔与俱乐部签署了新的一年合同。这份延期合同确保了这位后卫在老特拉福德的未来。

title: Derby's Agyemang to miss World Cup with Achilles injury
summary: Patrick Agyemang is ruled out of the USA's home World Cup after suffering a serious Achilles tendon injury while playing for Derby. His absence represents a significant loss for the national team.
content: Patrick Agyemang is ruled out of playing in a home World Cup for the USA after suffering a "serious" Achilles tendon injury in Derby win against Stoke.

zh.title: 德比的阿吉曼因跟腱伤缺席世界杯
zh.summary: 帕特里克·阿吉曼在为德比效力时遭遇严重跟腱伤，被排除在美国主办的世界杯之外。他的缺席对国家队来说是重大损失。

title: Did quadruple ambition set bar too high for Arsenal?
summary: Rory Smith examines whether Arsenal's pursuit of the quadruple created unrealistic expectations that led to ultimate disappointment. The analysis questions the club's strategic ambitions.
content: Monday Night Club's Rory Smith explains why the quadruple was too much for Arsenal.

zh.title: 四冠王野心是否给阿森纳设置了过高的目标？
zh.summary: 罗里·史密斯分析阿森纳对四冠王的追求是否造成了不切实际的期望，最终导致失望。该分析质疑了俱乐部的战略野心。

title: Ramsey memories are made of this
summary: BBC Sport Wales reflects on Aaron Ramsey's career highlights as he announces his retirement from professional football. The tribute piece celebrates his achievements across club and country.
content: BBC Sport Wales takes a look back at some of Aaron Ramsey's career highlights as he announces his retirement.

zh.title: 拉姆塞的回忆就是这样铸就的
zh.summary: 英国广播公司威尔士体育部在亚伦·拉姆塞宣布从职业足球退役时回顾了他职业生涯的亮点。这篇致敬文章庆祝了他在俱乐部和国家队的成就。

title: Ex-footballer Barton denies golf club attack
summary: Former Manchester City, Newcastle United, QPR, Burnley and Rangers player Joey Barton has denied assault allegations stemming from an incident outside a golf club. The legal matter continues to develop.
content: The ex-Manchester City, Newcastle United, QPR,  Burnley and Rangers player is accused of assault.

zh.title: 前足球运动员巴顿否认高尔夫俱乐部袭击指控
zh.summary: 前曼城、纽卡斯尔联队、英超、伯恩利和流浪者队球员乔伊·巴顿否认了源自高尔夫俱乐部外事件的袭击指控。法律事项继续发展。

title: Wales captain and ex-Arsenal star Ramsey retires
summary: Wales captain and former Arsenal midfielder Aaron Ramsey retires from professional football with immediate effect. His retirement ends a distinguished career spanning both club and international football.
content: Wales captain and former Arsenal midfielder Aaron Ramsey retires from professional football with immediate effect.

zh.title: 威尔士队长及前阿森纳明星拉姆齐退役
zh.summary: 威尔士队长及前阿森纳中场球员亚伦·拉姆齐立即退役。他的退役结束了跨越俱乐部和国际足球的杰出职业生涯。

title: Barry gets first England call-up as Godfrey injured
summary: Bay FC forward Keira Barry receives her first England call-up for the upcoming Women's World Cup qualifiers against Spain and Iceland following an injury to Godfrey. The selection represents a career milestone for Barry.
content: Bay FC forward Keira Barry receives her first call-up to the England squad for the upcoming Women's World Cup qualifiers against Spain and Iceland.

zh.title: 戈德弗雷受伤后，巴里获得首次英格兰征召
zh.summary: 湾队前锋凯拉·巴里因戈德弗雷受伤，获得了她对西班牙和冰岛即将举行的女性世界杯预选赛的首次英格兰征召。这个选择代表了巴里职业生涯的一个重要里程碑。

title: 'Celtic assess Dundee goalkeeper McCracken' - gossip
summary: Celtic are reportedly monitoring Dundee goalkeeper McCracken as a potential recruit, while also showing interest in a Hibernian midfielder. The interest comes as Motherwell manager Jens Berthel Askou addresses speculation about his own future.
content: Celtic are being linked with a Dundee goalkeeper and Hibernian midfielder as Motherwell manager Jens Berthel Askou addresses speculation about his future.

zh.title: 凯尔特人评估邓迪门神麦克拉肯
zh.summary: 据报道，凯尔特人正在监测邓迪门神麦克拉肯作为潜在引援目标，同时也对希伯尼安的一名中场球员感兴趣。这一兴趣的出现正值母威尔经理延斯·贝尔特尔·阿斯库处理关于自己前景的猜测之时。

title: Why Real Madrid tie could make or break Kane's Ballon d'Or hopes
summary: Harry Kane leads Europe's goalscorers but faces uncertainty about his Ballon d'Or prospects without a major trophy win. A crucial match against Real Madrid could prove decisive in determining whether he has a legitimate chance at the prestigious individual award.
content: Harry Kane is the leading goalscorer in Europe but does he need to win a major trophy to have a chance of winning the prestigious award?

zh.title: 为什么皇马对阵可能决定凯恩的金球奖前景
zh.summary: 哈里·凯恩领跑欧洲射手榜，但在没有重大锦标赛胜利的情况下，他的金球奖前景面临不确定性。对皇马的一场关键比赛可能会在决定他是否有机会获得这一享有盛誉的个人奖项方面发挥决定性作用。

title: How Sporting hero Gyokeres could end European run
summary: Viktor Gyokeres returns to face his former club Sporting, where he left a legendary impact, as Arsenal battles to advance to the Champions League semi-finals. The standoff pits the prolific striker against the team that launched his European reputation.
content: Viktor Gyokeres' impact at Sporting will never be forgotten, but he returns on Tuesday hoping to help fire Arsenal into the Champions League semi-finals.

zh.title: 体育英雄久克雷斯如何可能结束欧洲之旅
zh.summary: 维克托·久克雷斯回归对阵他的前东家体育队，在那里他留下了传奇的影响，同时阿森纳为推进欧冠半决赛而奋力。这场对峙将这位多产的前锋与为他建立欧洲声誉的球队对立。

title: 54 years, 48 leagues, 2,000 grounds - the ultimate football odyssey
summary: A dedicated UK groundhopper concludes a historic decades-long journey visiting 2,000 football grounds across 48 leagues over 54 years. BBC Sport documents the final chapter of this record-breaking odyssey.
content: BBC Sport travels with the UK's ultimate groundhopper to the final match of a decades-long, history-making journey.

zh.title: 54年、48个联赛、2000个球场——终极足球奥德赛
zh.summary: 一位专注的英国球场访客完成了跨越54年、造访48个联赛中2000个足球球场的历史性旅程。英国广播公司体育部记录了这场创纪录奥德赛的最后篇章。

title: James back with Minnesota after hospitalization
summary: Colombian star James Rodríguez, who was hospitalized last week for severe dehydration, returned to his MLS club Minnesota United FC on Monday to continue his ramp-up to game readiness.
content: Colombian star James Rodríguez, who was hospitalized last week for severe dehydration, returned to his MLS club Minnesota United FC on Monday to continue his ramp-up to game readiness.

zh.title: 詹姆斯住院后回归明尼苏达
zh.summary: 哥伦比亚球星詹姆斯·罗德里格斯因严重脱水上周住院，周一回到他的美职联俱乐部明尼苏达联队，继续为复出比赛做准备。

title: Arteta preaches calm ahead of Sporting quarterfinal
summary: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal's players not to panic as they aim to get their season back on track against Sporting Lisbon.
content: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal's players not to panic as they aim to get their season back on track against Sporting Lisbon.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔在葡萄牙体育四分之一决赛前呼吁保持冷静
zh.summary: 米克尔·阿尔特塔敦促阿森纳球员不要惊慌失措，因为他们的目标是在与葡萄牙体育队的比赛中重振赛季。

title: McKennie equals career best with goal in Juve win
summary: United States midfielder Weston McKennie scored for Juventus in a 2-0 win over Genoa Monday and was named man of the match.
content: United States midfielder Weston McKennie scored for Juventus in a 2-0 win over Genoa Monday and was named man of the match.

zh.title: 麦肯尼在尤文胜利中打进职业生涯最高进球数
zh.summary: 美国中场韦斯顿·麦肯尼周一在尤文图斯2-0击败热那亚的比赛中进球，被评为全场最佳。

title: Kane available for Bayern in first leg with Madrid
summary: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane practiced on Monday and is expected to be available against Real Madrid in their Champions League quarterfinal on Tuesday.
content: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane practiced on Monday and is expected to be available against Real Madrid in their Champions League quarterfinal on Tuesday.

zh.title: 凯恩在与马德里的首回合比赛中可能为拜仁出战
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑前锋哈里·凯恩在周一进行了训练，预计将在周二的欧冠四分之一决赛中对阵皇家马德里时出场。
